title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE JESUS M. COLMENARES DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BALASAN, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, INTO A FIFTY-BED CAPACITY DISTRICT HOSPITAL, TO BE KNOWN AS THE JESUS M. COLMENARES DISTRICT HOSPITAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 33050 / 88 OG No. 27, 4291 (July 6, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7566, May 26, 1992 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE JESUS M. COLMENARES DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BALASAN, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, INTO A FIFTY-BED CAPACITY DISTRICT HOSPITAL, TO BE KNOWN AS THE JESUS M. COLMENARES DISTRICT HOSPITAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Jesus M. Colmenares District Hospital in the Municipality of Balasan, Province of Iloilo, is hereby converted into a fifty-bed capacity district hospital, to be known as the Jesus M. Colmenares District Hospital.

SEC. 2. The amount necessary for the implementation of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment and every year thereafter.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on December 17, 1991 and February 3, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: May 26, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
